claims: A "stub creator" skill for test automation requests unrestricted Bash command execution (`Bash(cmd:*)`) alongside broad file system permissions (Read, Write, Edit). This level of access is excessive for a tool meant to generate code stubs and configurations, as it could enable arbitrary system-level actions unrelated to stub creation, such as installing packages, modifying unrelated files, or executing harmful commands.
